entries.note: Adani Enterprises executed a QIP at a floor price of ₹3,034.68 per share in July 2026, serving as a large-cap conglomerate benchmark for institutional ECM appetite during a broader market recovery phase.

Prudential received IRDAI approval in July 2026 to commence a joint venture health insurance operation with HCL, establishing it as a new institutionally-backed private health insurer in India with medium-term growth capital and potential IPO requirements.

HCL Health Insurance is a greenfield private health insurer established via a joint venture with Prudential, receiving IRDAI regulatory approval in July 2026; the entity is expected to require growth equity rounds and is a prospective IPO candidate over the medium term.

Social Worth Technologies, the parent entity of the Fibe (formerly EarlySalary) lending-tech platform, filed a DRHP with SEBI in July 2026 for a ₹750 crore fresh-issue IPO, with an OFS component indicating PE and early-stage investor exit intent in the NBFC-fintech segment.

PB Fintech, the listed insurance-tech and lending marketplace platform, saw a 2.6% block sale in July 2026, providing secondary price-discovery data for institutional demand depth in the BFSI fintech segment at prevailing valuations.

Prism, the holding entity of Oyo, filed a UDRHP-I with SEBI in July 2026 for an all-fresh-issue mainboard IPO of ₹6,650 crore aimed primarily at debt reduction; as one of the largest near-term primary market filings it is a significant QIB bandwidth consumer with implications for concurrent BFSI deal timing.

SEBI proposed regulations in mid-2026 restricting celebrity endorsements for investment schemes, drawing industry pushback; the outcome of this consultation is expected to reshape retail IPO marketing strategies and affect intermediary distribution models for primary issuances.

RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra affirmed in July 2026 that India will not raise its 4% inflation target, reinforcing a credible long-term monetary framework that supports stable long-end bond yields and provides a predictable pricing environment for AT1, Tier-2, and long-dated sub-debt issuances by BFSI entities.
